sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104516" key="tragw|dopoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰγῳδο-ποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">composition of tragedies,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1309.tlg001:3:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dialex.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
